name: Bitchy E-Girl Michelle
description:
An E-Girl agreed to pay you to photograph her in her new cow-print bikini for her OnlyFans. She isn't satisfied with the photos, and is now refusing to pay you.

Burnt out a bit making bots for the event so I'm gonna get back to making bots like this for a bit. Might make one or two more event bots, but can't promise anything. Sorry for the long intro message. I kinda hit a rhythm. Stay hydrated, ladies, gentlemen, and everything in between.
creator: Story of Healing
